hero.description: Integrated production studio in Morocco: scriptwriting, talent recruitment, film production, and international distribution.

history.p1: Founded in 2018, Vision in Motion is an integrated production studio in Morocco, dedicated to the professionalization of the national and international film industry.
history.p2: From scriptwriting to talent recruitment, we offer a complete ecosystem allowing creators to realize their most ambitious visions on the global stage.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know
faq.q1: How can I participate in a casting?
faq.a1: You can send us your portfolio and artistic CV via the contact form by selecting the 'Casting' subject, or follow us on our social media for project announcements.
faq.a2: Yes, Vision in Motion is always looking for new voices. Please send us a short synopsis (pitch) via the form. If the concept interests us, we will contact you for the full script.
faq.a3: We regularly welcome passionate interns in the fields of directing, editing, and production. Send us your motivated application.
